sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111634" key="filu/drhlos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλ-ύδρηλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111634.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loving moisture,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κῆπος</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
